unit.note: F0 fresh full suites: server vitest 1592/1592 (incl. new campaign-events.test.ts 14 + campaigns.events.test.ts 3) + client vitest 1584/1584 (incl. extended campaignsApi.selectors.test.ts + doc-sync campaign-events token); tsc --noEmit clean both workspaces; oxlint clean on touched files.

integration.note: Real-route HTTP tests through createCampaignsRoutes + on-disk shipwright_events.jsonl (campaigns.events.test.ts): overlay completion onto a stale dir-sourced step, synthesize derived campaign with no dir, missing-log no-op.

e2e.note: campaign-events-projection.spec.ts executed against a live single-process isolated stack (Hono :3996 + SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR client/dist, temp USERPROFILE) seeded with a fixture project that has NO campaign dir + a stamped events.jsonl: derived campaign card + 'events' badge + 2/2 + both steps complete.

surface_verification.evidence_path: live isolated stack :3996 (built client + tsx server, temp USERPROFILE); 1 passed (4.1s)

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Behaviors introduced/changed by core/campaign-events.ts (projectCampaignEvents + readCampaignEvents + applyEventsProjection overlay/synthesize), the GET /api/campaigns route wiring, the selectActiveCampaigns derivedFromEvents exception, and the CampaignLaneCard 'events' badge.

behaviors.behavior: projectCampaignEvents groups work_completed by top-level campaign+sub_iterate_id; ignores non-work_completed / missing campaign / missing sid
latest event wins per sub_iterate_id (ts epoch, file-index tiebreak; unparseable ts oldest)
tolerates corrupt / blank / non-object JSON lines (torn 3s-poll read)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-events.test.ts 'tolerates corrupt lines' + Boundary Probe (real 209-line log + torn line)

behaviors.behavior: overlay bumps a pending step to complete and recomputes done/nextPending
never-downgrade: complete stays with no event; failed superseded by a complete event
empty event commit never clobbers a real local commit; non-empty overrides
behaviors.evidence: campaign-events.test.ts 'does NOT touch ... empty event commit'

behaviors.behavior: no events -> dir-sourced campaigns untouched (no derivedFromEvents)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-events.test.ts 'leaves campaigns untouched'; campaigns.events.test.ts 'a missing event log ...'

behaviors.behavior: synthesize derivedFromEvents campaign (all complete, no skeleton, specPath null, numeric-id order, status null)
does NOT synthesize a slug already present locally (overlay owns it)
locals + synthesized sorted by slug descending
route GET overlays event completions through createCampaignsRoutes (real on-disk events.jsonl)
route GET synthesizes derivedFromEvents when the campaign dir is absent
projection failure is tolerant — never 500s the route (try/catch guard)
behaviors.evidence: covered by readCampaignEvents tolerance + route guard; campaigns.test.ts suite stays green

behaviors.behavior: selectActiveCampaigns keeps derivedFromEvents campaigns visible despite done==total
selector exception stays narrow: a normal done==total campaign is still hidden
CampaignLaneCard renders the 'events' provenance badge only when derivedFromEvents
end-to-end: seeded events.jsonl + no campaign dir -> board renders derived card, events badge, 2/2, both steps complete
behaviors.evidence: E2E campaign-events-projection.spec.ts against live isolated stack :3996
